jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Full Vitest suite passed: 163 files / 640 tests
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws active after restart; /api/status ready; /announcements and /tickets returned 307 redirects; /api/announcements and /api/tickets returned 401 without 500; no recent warning/error logs

lastRun.target: P4 UI availability and polish: mobile nav stability plus non-reloading create forms
lastRun.summary: Replaced fragile mobile bottom-nav array indexes with stable href-based selection and replaced announcement/ticket creation full page reloads with App Router refreshes, adding regressions for each behavior.
validation: GET /announcements and /tickets returned 307; GET /api/announcements and /api/tickets returned 401 without 500
lastRun.deployment: production services restarted and smoke 19/19 passed
lastRun.nextTarget: Fresh audit checkpoint is due because the counter exceeded the threshold; after recording this commit, run/update a comprehensive audit, then continue with remaining P3/P4/P5/P6 priorities.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
